subject: Re: Importing old alignments from imod question
body:
Hi Pranav,

I've always wondered about this, so it's nice to get some confirmation on 
the relative importance of geometric handedness. I've never been able to 
get a good average from Warp/M and/or Relion 4/5 with this dataset, so I'm 
a bit paranoid about all the parameters.

Thanks, Huy!

This, and honestly all the scripts in that repo, will be really useful!
